info.name: Form SA API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for Form SA (SA-I through SA-V) traffic intersection analysis - Updated Header-Based Approach

item.name: 🚀 Survey Header Management
item.description: Header-based APIs for managing survey headers that can be reused across multiple forms

item.name: 🚀 Test SA-II GET API
item.description: Test the new SA-II vehicle traffic data retrieval API

item.name: 🚗 Form SA-II (Vehicle Data)
item.description: SA-II: Vehicle Data by Movement Direction APIs

item.name: 🚀 NEW: Get SA-II Vehicle Traffic Data
item.description: Retrieves aggregated vehicle traffic data by movement direction (BKi, Lurus, BKa) for all vehicle types based on survey's simpang_id

item.name: 📈 Form SA-IV (Capacity Analysis)
item.description: SA-IV: Saturated Flow and Capacity Analysis APIs

item.name: ⏱️ Form SA-V (Delay Analysis)
item.description: SA-V: Delay and Performance Analysis APIs
